creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
(In reply to O. Hartmann from comment #27)
You have a problem with the pkg-plist on 14.2 amd poudriere: 
Why do you not test the package in poudriere?

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libLLVM-18.so
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-x86_64-portbld-%%PYTHON_PLATFORM%%.1-avx.bc
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-x86_64-portbld-%%PYTHON_PLATFORM%%.1-avx2.bc
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-x86_64-portbld-%%PYTHON_PLATFORM%%.1-avx512.bc
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-x86_64-portbld-%%PYTHON_PLATFORM%%.1-avx_f16c.bc
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-x86_64-portbld-%%PYTHON_PLATFORM%%.1-avx_fma4.bc
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-x86_64-portbld-%%PYTHON_PLATFORM%%.1-sse2.bc
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-x86_64-portbld-%%PYTHON_PLATFORM%%.1-sse41.bc
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-x86_64-portbld-%%PYTHON_PLATFORM%%.1-ssse3.bc
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-%%CONFIGURE_TARGET%%-avx.bc
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-%%CONFIGURE_TARGET%%-avx2.bc
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-%%CONFIGURE_TARGET%%-avx512.bc
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-%%CONFIGURE_TARGET%%-avx_f16c.bc
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-%%CONFIGURE_TARGET%%-avx_fma4.bc
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-%%CONFIGURE_TARGET%%-sse2.bc
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-%%CONFIGURE_TARGET%%-sse41.bc
Error: Missing: %%DATADIR%%/kernel-%%CONFIGURE_TARGET%%-ssse3.bc

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/pocl
=>> Error: check-plist failures detected
